name: SUEWS Assistant
description: AI-powered configuration guidance and result interpretation for the Surface Urban Energy and Water balance Scheme (SUEWS)
author: Ting Sun & Claude Code

suewsPath.description: Path to SUEWS installation (optional - for advanced features)

dataPath.description: Default directory for SUEWS input/output files

validate_suews_config.description: Check a SUEWS configuration file for scientific soundness and common errors

suggest_suews_parameters.description: Get parameter recommendations based on urban context and climate zone

check_suews_physics_compatibility.description: Verify that selected physics methods work well together

generate_suews_template.description: Create a configuration template tailored to your site and research focus

explain_suews_parameter.description: Get detailed explanation of any SUEWS parameter with typical values

diagnose_suews_energy_balance.description: Analyze energy balance closure and identify potential issues

interpret_suews_thermal_comfort.description: Interpret thermal comfort metrics from SUEWS outputs

analyze_suews_urban_effects.description: Examine urban heat island and other urban climate effects

validate_suews_against_observations.description: Compare model results with measured data

generate_suews_insights_report.description: Create comprehensive narrative report from simulation results

prompts.name: urban_climate_expert
prompts.description: I'm an expert in urban climate modeling and SUEWS. I can help you create scientifically sound configurations, interpret results, and understand urban climate processes.

prompts.name: config_wizard
prompts.description: Starting a new SUEWS project? I'll guide you through creating the perfect configuration for your site and research goals.

prompts.name: result_interpreter
prompts.description: I can analyze your SUEWS outputs and provide insights about energy balance, thermal comfort, and urban climate effects.
